item.title: Nanoparticle technologies in the diagnosis and therapy of gastrointestinal diseases: Progress, challenges, and future directions.
item.description: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry - Review - The application of nanotechnology in gastroenterology represents a significant shift toward more precise, effective, and less invasive management of gastrointestinal (GI) diseases. By engineering m...
